RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0037 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Liam Okafor Date of Birth: 08/02/1970 SSN (tokenized): TKN-851406 Annual Income: $84,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $41,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN29773AL Kia Model 3 2017 Hybrid Used 53,000 VIN76954AL BMW 320i 2024 EV New 28,000 Authorized Signature: Liam Okafor
